message:
Running command: 
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Set up a faster drain loop while DRT antenna repair runs  
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
    sleep 15
    dd if=/proc/956480/fd/11 bs=4096 count=128 >> /tmp/pipe_extra.log 2>/dev/null
    
    # Check for completion signals
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    NEWDIRS=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | grep "^7[1-9]\|^8\|^9" 2>/dev/null | head -3)
    FINAL=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    
    echo "[$i/60] $(date +%H:%M:%S) PID=$ORPID newdirs=$NEWDIRS final=$FINAL"
    tail -5 /tmp/pipe_extra.log 2>/dev/null
    echo "---"
    
    # Stop if DRT complete and new steps appeared
    [ -n "$NEWDIRS" ] && echo "=== New steps after DRT! ===" && ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -10 && break
    [ -n "$FINAL" ] && echo "=== FINAL DIR APPEARED ===" && break
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "=== OpenROAD exited ===" && break
done

message.content: DRT main run completed with **0 DRC violations** — now in antenna repair. Draining pipe continuously.

args.command:

    [ -n "$FINAL" ] && echo "=== FINAL DIR APPEARED ===" && break
